verses.1: A Song of Ascents. To You I have raised my eyes, You who are enthroned in the heavens!
verses.2: Behold, as the eyes of servants look to the hand of their master, As the eyes of a female servant to the hand of her mistress, So our eyes look to the LORD our God, Until He is gracious to us.
verses.3: Be gracious to us, LORD, be gracious to us, For we have had much more than enough of contempt.
verses.4: Our soul has had much more than enough Of the scoffing of those who are at ease, And with the contempt of the proud.
